hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.html) cd /Users/veerendra/pixelpotDS && node -e "const vm=require('vm'),html=require('fs').readFileSync('$FILE','utf8');[...html.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*src)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/g)].forEach((m,i)=>{try{new vm.Script(m[1]);}catch(e){console.error('\u274c JS syntax error in script '+i+': '+e.message);process.exit(1);}});console.log('\u2705 JS OK: $FILE');" 2>&1;; esac || true
